about.title: What is GreenX?
about.description: GreenX is a next-generation agriculture technology platform that connects landowners, field managers, experts, and workers on a single intelligent dashboard. We leverage real-time weather data, soil analytics, crop health monitoring, and drone technology to maximize yields and minimize waste.

features.title: What We Do
features.weather_desc: Live weather forecasts for every farm based on location and pincode.
features.soil_desc: NPK, pH, moisture and organic carbon monitoring for precision farming.
features.drone_desc: Aerial crop monitoring and health assessment using drone technology.
features.task_desc: Assign and track daily farm tasks across your entire workforce.
features.finance_desc: Revenue projections, profit sharing, and expense management.
features.diagnostics_desc: Expert-driven disease and pest risk assessments with prescriptions.

login_page.title: Login to GreenX
login_page.contact_admin: Contact your administrator to get your login credentials.
